title: Why do people think the writer is mad?

meanings.usage: 指交通工具，常用英式拼写，美式为airplane
形容人的精神状态，也可表示对某事疯狂热衷（be mad about）
供飞机起飞、降落、停放的场所
指从某地经过或穿过某物
指不悦耳的声音，常与make, cause等词搭配
drive sb. mad意为使某人发疯；drive away意为驱赶
determine to do something表示决心做某事
表示可能性较大，比maybe更正式
offer sb. something向某人提供某物
knock down意为撞倒；knock at/on敲门
表示持续不断，强调时间之长
表示迫使某人离开某地

phrases.usage: 日以继夜，表示持续不断发生

examples.en: The machines work night and day.
The constant noise drove me mad.
examples.zh: 持续的噪音让我快要发疯了。

examples.en: The new railway came into use last year.
The farmers drove the cows away from the field.
The old building was knocked down last month.
examples.zh: 那栋旧楼上个月被拆除了。

examples.en: He received a large sum of money from his uncle.
examples.zh: 他从他叔叔那里得到了一大笔钱。

examples.en: She is determined to finish the project on time.
examples.zh: 她决心按时完成这个项目。

examples.en: For some reason, the meeting was cancelled.
examples.zh: 由于某种原因，会议被取消了。

examples.en: You must be tired after the long journey.
examples.zh: 长途旅行后你一定很累。

examples.en: He is one of the few people who can speak five languages.
examples.zh: 他是少数能说五种语言的人之一。

grammar.title: 现在完成时的被动语态 (Present Perfect Passive)
grammar.definition: 表示一个过去的动作对现在造成影响，且主语是动作的承受者
grammar.usage: 用于强调动作的承受者，或动作执行者不明确/不重要时

examples.en: The airport has come into use.
Over a hundred people must have been driven away.
examples.zh: 肯定有上百人被赶走了。

grammar.title: must表示推测 (Must for Deduction)
grammar.definition: must用于肯定句中表示对现在或过去情况的肯定推测
grammar.structure: must + 动词原形（对现在推测）；must have + 过去分词（对过去推测）
grammar.usage: must表示推测时只用于肯定句，否定句用can't，疑问句用can

examples.en: Everybody says I must be mad.
examples.zh: 大家都说我一定是疯了。

examples.en: You must be hungry after working so long.
examples.zh: 工作了这么久你一定饿了。

grammar.title: 现在进行时的被动语态 (Present Continuous Passive)
grammar.definition: 表示正在进行的被动动作
grammar.usage: 强调正在被进行的动作

examples.en: New houses are being built in this area.
examples.zh: 这个地区正在建造新房子。

original.en: Aeroplanes are slowly driving me mad.

imitations.en: Worry is slowly driving her mad.
The hot weather is driving the tourists mad.
imitations.zh: 炎热的天气快让游客们发疯了。

original.en: Over a hundred people must have been driven away from their homes.
original.zh: 肯定有超过一百人被从家中赶走。

imitations.en: The thief must have been caught by now.
imitations.zh: 小偷现在肯定已经被抓住了。

imitations.en: They must have been informed about the changes.
imitations.zh: 他们一定已经被告知了这些变化。

sentencePatterns.pattern: have been offered + something + to do

original.en: I have been offered a large sum of money to go away.
original.zh: 有人给我一大笔钱让我搬走。

imitations.en: She has been offered a good job to work abroad.
imitations.zh: 有人给她提供了一个去国外工作的好职位。

imitations.en: We have been offered a discount to buy the house.
imitations.zh: 有人给我们打了折扣买这房子。

sentencePatterns.pattern: be one of the few/only + 名词

original.en: I am one of the few people left.
original.zh: 我是少数留下来的人之一。

imitations.en: She is one of the few students who passed the exam.
imitations.zh: 她是少数通过考试的学生之一。

imitations.en: This is one of the few buildings that survived the war.
imitations.zh: 这是战争后幸存的少数建筑之一。
